title: Creamy Coconut Soup
description: A rich and comforting soup made with coconut milk and savory flavor. Perfect for a cold day.
instructions: Heat the savory in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the water and bring to a boil.
Add the coconut milk and silk.
Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
